topics: Stereo Isomerism: Configurational Isomerism, Geometrical and Optical isomers, Wedge and Fischer projections, E-Z Nomenclature, R&S Configuration
Nanomaterials: Classification based on materials, Synthesis (Sol-gel and Chemical reduction), Bio-applications of nanomaterials
Carbon Nanotubes, Fullerenes and Graphene: structure, properties and applications
Polymers: Biodegradable polymers (PHBV and PLA), Synthesis, properties and applications
Conducting Polymers: Classification, Polyaniline and Polypyrrole, Synthesis, properties and applications (Biosensors and artificial muscles)
Nano polymers: Dendrimers, biological applications
Electrode potential and Nernst equation for single electrode and cell (numerical problems)
Reference electrodes: SHE and Calomel electrode (construction and working)
Electrochemical series and applications
Glass Electrode and pH Measurement
Conductivity measurement using digital conductivity meter
Li-ion battery and H2-O2 fuel cell (acid electrolyte only): construction and working
Corrosion control methods: Galvanic series, Cathodic Protection (Sacrificial anodic protection and impressed current cathodic protection)
Electroplating of copper
Electroless plating of copper
Types of spectra and molecular energy levels
Beer-Lambert's law (numerical problems)
Electronic Spectroscopy: Principle, types of electronic transitions, role of conjugation in absorption maxima, instrumentation and applications
Vibrational Spectroscopy: Principle, number of vibrational modes, vibrational modes of CO2 and H2O, applications
Chromatographic methods: Basic principles and applications of column and TLC, retention factor
HPLC: Principle, instrumentation (block diagram), retention time and applications
Electron Microscopic Techniques: SEM - Principle, instrumentation and applications
Fuels: Calorific value (HCV and LCV), experimental determination of calorific value of solid fuels
Biofuels: Biodiesel and Green Hydrogen
Environmental Chemistry - Water characteristics: Hardness, types of hardness (Temporary and Permanent), disadvantages of hard water, degree of hardness (numericals)
Water softening methods: Ion exchange process (principle, procedure and advantages)
Reverse osmosis: Principle, process and advantages
Water disinfection methods: Chlorination, break point chlorination, ozone and UV irradiation
Dissolved oxygen (DO): Estimation (Winkler's method)
BOD and COD: Definition, estimation and significance (numericals)
Waste Management: Sewage water treatment - Primary, Secondary and Tertiary, flow diagram, trickling filter and UASB process
Chemistry of climate change: Greenhouse gases and ozone depletion
Sustainable Development: An introduction to Sustainable Development Goals
